name: Starter Elemental Caster
summary: A ranged elemental spell starter that lets new players learn boss patterns from a safe distance while scaling damage through gem levels and elemental damage rather than expensive uniques.
who_should_play: First-time Path of Exile 2 players who want safe spacing during boss fights.
Players who prefer one clear main-damage button over juggling many skills.
Players on a low budget who want a build that works on campaign rares.
review_notes: Research-backed archetype skeleton. Not yet in-game tested; exact gem and base ids pending verified data.

source.notes: Authored from research cards 03-09; not a copied creator build.

failure_modes: Fragile if elemental resistances and life are ignored while pushing damage.
Mana sustain can stall the rotation if too many supports are added early.

skills.name: Primary elemental spell

supports.name: Cast speed / reliability support
supports.note: Smoother feel before chasing raw damage.

skills.note: Pick one spell you can aim comfortably and commit to scaling it.

skills.name: Movement / escape skill
skills.note: Repositioning is a defensive layer for a ranged caster.

passive_milestones.goal: Take nearby life and elemental damage clusters; avoid travelling far for niche keystones.
Pick up cast speed and a recovery/leech node so the rotation sustains during longer fights.
Path toward resistance and life mastery options before chasing pure damage.

notes: Exact Strength/Dexterity/Intelligence requirements need verified gem and base data before publishing as final.
Caster gems are Intelligence-weighted; keep Intelligence comfortably above your highest gem requirement.

weapon.budget_note: Use a cheap rare during campaign; do not chase perfect affixes early.

body_armour.base: Energy-shield or hybrid base that meets attribute requirements
priority: attributes if a gem is gated
body_armour.budget_note: Survivability first; a defensive chest outvalues a damage roll early.

helmet.budget_note: A plain rare with life and resists is enough for campaign.

boots.base: Any defensive base that meets attribute requirements
boots.budget_note: Movement speed is a practical defensive stat for a ranged caster.

belt.budget_note: Belts are an easy slot to patch resistance holes.

amulet.budget_note: The amulet often carries the Intelligence that keeps your gems usable.

priority: attributes if a requirement is tight
ring_1.budget_note: Rings are your most flexible resistance slots.

ring_2.budget_note: Pair with ring 1 to finish capping resistances.

gear_swap_warnings.message: If your amulet supplies the Intelligence that meets your spell gem requirement, swapping it without replacing that Intelligence can disable your main skill.

campaign_targets: Keep elemental resistances as high as the campaign allows for your level.
Keep life or energy shield current with your zone level.
early_maps_targets: Have a repeatable recovery source and a movement option.
defenses.recovery: Plan one reliable recovery layer (life/ES regeneration, leech, or flask uptime).
defenses.movement_baseline: Movement speed on boots plus a movement/escape skill.
defenses.chaos_resistance_note: Chaos resistance is a bonus during campaign, not a campaign priority.
map_mods_to_avoid: Not yet verified in-game for this draft; review before mapping.

required_stats: matching attribute requirement you can meet
